---
name: New Target Request
about: Request support for a new agentic coding tool
title: "[New Target] "
labels: ["new-target"]
assignees: []
---

**Tool name**
The name of the tool you want agentroles to support.

**Tool URL**
Link to the tool's website or GitHub repository.

**Why should agentroles support this tool?**
Explain why this tool is important for agentic coding workflows.

**Config surface**
Does this tool have a config file (YAML/JSON/TOML), CLI flags, or environment variables for specifying which model to use? Provide details.

**Can different models be assigned to different roles/tasks?**
If yes, describe how. If no, explain how a single-model mapping would still be useful.

**Any known limitations?**
Does the tool have constraints on which models it can use (e.g., Anthropic-only, specific formats, max N model slots)?
